name: DailyFieldWalk
description: End-of-day site-photo workflow for the BIM coordinator: review the day's pending photos, bulk-approve eligible ones, preview the client digest, then push the latest deliverable register to Planscape so the daily 17:00 UTC digest job has fresh content.

steps.label: 3. Audit active photo checklists for this project
4. Bulk-approve pending photos with default caption
6. Push the latest deliverable register so the digest finds it fresh
